authenticationType.label: No authenticationUse when no credentials are required for the request.

expect.label: Return error if HTTP request fails

notes.content: If the imported webhook shows a broken/dummy hook, open module 1, click Add/Create webhook, save, then use the generated URL in GitHub repo Settings -> Webhooks.
PUT body content expressions use valid Make IML: concat uses semicolons and quoted string literals. No nested {{ }} inside concat.
Sequential GitHub Contents API updates. Replace TODO_GITHUB_TOKEN in all Authorization headers after import.
Gets PR diff only for merged PRs from agent/ or agent-team/ branches.
Create webhook in Make, then add it to GitHub repo webhooks. Event: Pull requests. Content type: application/json.
